extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters against the Company, by the Company, involving subsidiaries, directors and promoters. I counted the against rows only: criminal proceedings are 7 against the Company plus 2 involving Directors, while regulatory/statutory actions are 24 against the Company plus 2 involving Directors; tax proceedings are 75 against the Company plus 4 involving subsidiaries, excluding all 'by our Company' rows and excluding director tax matters. For the aggregate quantified amount against the Company and subsidiaries, I used the stated Total rows of ₹342.44 million for the Company and ₹108.56 million for subsidiaries, for ₹451.00 million in total; the director amount of ₹75 million was excluded. Contingent liabilities use the stated consolidated Total of ₹243.22 million as of June 30, 2021, rather than re-summing the line items. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the stated percentages elsewhere relate to other expense or delivery-aggregator metrics, not customer concentration. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹451.00 million = ₹45.10 crore and ₹243.22 million = ₹24.322 crore.
